title: Three Threads from Onboarding a CNC
description: Three threads pulled from onboarding a desktop CNC: chipquake (fracture mechanics through self-organized criticality), the substrate boundary (why community knowledge architecture depends on moderation), and the long bet (machining as cognitive grounding).

title: What 30+ Gandalf Challenges Taught Me About Prompt Injection
description: A taxonomy of prompt injection attack patterns derived from 30+ Gandalf Agent Breaker challenges, organized by attack surface rather than challenge name.

title: Building a Blog Post Skill for Claude
description: How to build a custom Claude skill that turns conversations into structured dev blog posts using an expanded STAR framework.
